pi_items.source: Verified against the export script export_result.sh which explicitly targets and writes to this exact path.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the data is the real NASA eCRM-001 conceptual aircraft model (eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3), establishing that the data is not synthetic. The expected result_file path is explicitly confirmed as '/tmp/openvsp_multi_format_export_result.json' based on the export_result.sh script configuration. Furthermore, the task instructions strictly demand that all exports must use 'File > Export', but the README and OpenVSP convention locate Degen Geom under 'Analysis > Degen Geom', highlighting a contradiction in the agent's instructions.
